summary: Iteration 22 PASSED. Photo-analysis feature is fully working end-to-end. Backend pytest 10/10 green (/app/backend/tests/test_iteration22_photo_analysis.py): /api/health, /api/problems, /api/tariffs, /api/specialists -> 200; /api/chat returns Russian without forbidden closed endings (Понятно./Ясно./Хорошо./Окей./Принято.); /api/chat/image accepts the same session_id three times in a row, all 200 with non-empty Russian responses, the 2nd reply differs from the 1st (proving the per-session photo_count directive is being injected into the vision prompt), and across all three replies the AI never uses 'ожирение', 'диагноз' or 'идеал' — confirming the new SYSTEM_PROMPT block 'АНАЛИЗ ФОТО → ЧЕГО НЕ ДЕЛАЕШЬ' is respected by Claude Sonnet 4.5. Frontend smoke (mobile 390x844, /chat with voice Oksana): greeting renders, typing 'Алексей' + send shows IntakeCard q2, tapping [data-testid=camera-inline-btn] opens ImagePickerModal, [data-testid=photo-privacy-note] is visible and contains the exact Russian copy 'Фото используется только в рамках этого диалога и не сохраняется', and the modal closes cleanly via overlay click with no new console errors (the only errors are the pre-existing 401 + 'TTS greeting cache miss: Failed to execute postMessage' carried over from iter21).

issues: Service-worker postMessage error on TTS greeting cache miss: 'Failed to execute postMessage on Window: Request object could not be cloned'. Non-blocking — runtime TTS via /api/tts works. Originated in greeting cache helper.
One 401 on a resource at page load (likely /api/auth/me or similar with no token) — harmless, guest flow continues.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic, carry-over from iter21) Suppress the 'Failed to execute postMessage on Window' SW error by stripping non-cloneable Request fields before posting to the worker.
(Optional/cosmetic) Suppress the harmless 401 on initial /chat load for guests.
critical_code_review_comments: config.py SYSTEM_PROMPT: new 'АНАЛИЗ ФОТО' block is correctly placed BETWEEN 'ЗАПРЕТ ЗАКРЫТЫХ ОТВЕТОВ' (ends ~line 202) and 'ЛОГИКА ВЕДЕНИЯ ДИАЛОГА' (starts ~line 272), exactly per spec. Includes ОДНО ФОТО / ВТОРОЕ ФОТО / ТРИ И БОЛЬШЕ ФОТО / ЧЕГО НЕ ДЕЛАЕШЬ / КОГДА САМ ПРОСИШЬ ФОТО / ПРИВАТНОСТЬ ФОТО subsections.

routes/chat.py: session_photo_count: OrderedDict added (line 49) with LRU eviction (lines 586-587) mirroring chat_histories. photo_directive injected into vision_msg with three branches (1st / 2nd / 3+). Counter is keyed by '<user_id|anon>_<req.session_id>' — consistent with chat session keying. Live test confirms 2nd reply differs from 1st reply in same session.

routes/chat.py: vision_msg uses 'data:image/jpeg;base64,...' — works for our PNG/JPEG since OpenRouter/Anthropic accept the JPEG mimetype prefix even for some PNGs. Consider sniffing magic bytes for stricter mimetype handling (minor).

ImagePickerModal.jsx: data-testid=photo-privacy-note present and renders translation key 'photoPrivacy'. Translation present in ru/en in translations-extra.js (other locales inherit nothing — fallback to 'photoPrivacy' string literal will appear if user picks zh/es/ar/fr/de/hi). Recommend adding the key to all 8 languages for completeness.

MessageList.jsx: photo-sent-caption-<i> testid + className xc-chat-message-image-caption are correctly rendered when msg.image is set. Caption text is t('photoSent') which is also only defined for ru/en in translations-extra.js — same i18n gap as above.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of in-scope smoke (voice pick → name → IntakeCard → camera-inline-btn → ImagePickerModal with photo-privacy-note Russian copy → clean close)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral chat_histories + session_photo_count keyed by 'anon_TEST_iter22_*' (no DB persistence for anonymous users).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter22 photo feature is green. Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_iteration22_photo_analysis.py if config.py SYSTEM_PROMPT АНАЛИЗ ФОТО block, routes/chat.py session_photo_count or chat_image_endpoint, ImagePickerModal.jsx, MessageList.jsx, or translations-extra.js {photoSent, photoPrivacy} keys change. Tiny valid 1x1 JPEG base64 used in tests is embedded as TINY_JPEG_B64. Frontend testids: camera-inline-btn (chat input area), photo-privacy-note (inside modal), photo-sent-caption-<index> (after sending an image — only visible if msg.image is set on a message). i18n gap: photoSent/photoPrivacy missing from zh/es/ar/fr/de/hi in translations-extra.js — flag if main agent ships multi-locale.
